### Section 1c — General description — intended purpose

*Citations: Article 6(2), Article 13(3)(b), Annex IV §1(c), Article 43(4)*

| Field | Change | Substantiality | Old value | New value |
|-------|--------|----------------|-----------|-----------|
| `general_description.intended_purpose.description` | modified | **substantial** | Automated screening and ranking of job applications for white-collar positions. | Automated screening, ranking, and shortlisting of job applications for white-collar and technical positions. |



### Section 1b — General description — system identity

*Citations: Article 13(3)(b), Annex IV §1(b), Article 43(4)*

| Field | Change | Substantiality | Old value | New value |
|-------|--------|----------------|-----------|-----------|
| `general_description.system.version` | modified | **unknown** | 1.0 | 1.1 |



### Section 3a — Monitoring — accuracy metrics

*Citations: Article 15, Article 15(4), Annex IV §3, Article 43(4)*

| Field | Change | Substantiality | Old value | New value |
|-------|--------|----------------|-----------|-----------|
| `monitoring_functioning_control.accuracy_metrics[0].aggregate_value` | modified | **non_substantial** | 0.82 | 0.86 |



### Section 4 — Risk management

*Citations: Article 9, Article 9(2), Annex IV §4, Article 43(4)*

| Field | Change | Substantiality | Old value | New value |
|-------|--------|----------------|-----------|-----------|
| `risk_management.identified_risks[1].accepted_by` | added | **unknown** | — | Chief Risk Officer |
| `risk_management.identified_risks[1].impact` | added | **unknown** | — | Medium |
| `risk_management.identified_risks[1].likelihood` | added | **unknown** | — | Medium |
| `risk_management.identified_risks[1].mitigation` | added | **unknown** | — | Cultural bias testing and audit of proxies for protected characteristics |
| `risk_management.identified_risks[1].residual_risk` | added | **unknown** | — | Low |
| `risk_management.identified_risks[1].risk` | added | **substantial** | — | Video interview bias across cultural backgrounds |




---

## Factors that may indicate substantial modification (Article 43(4))

The following checklist identifies areas of change that regulators and notified bodies
consider when assessing whether a modification is substantial. A checked item does **not**
constitute a legal determination of substantiality.


- [x] **F1.** Change to the intended purpose of the AI system
  *(Article 43(4)(a), Article 9(2))* — **changes detected in this area**


- [ ] **F2.** Change to training, validation, or testing data
  *(Article 10, Article 43(4))*


- [ ] **F3.** Change to model architecture or core algorithm
  *(Article 43(4), Annex IV §2)*


- [x] **F4.** Significant change to performance or accuracy metrics
  *(Article 15, Article 43(4))* — **changes detected in this area**


- [ ] **F5.** Change to human oversight measures
  *(Article 14, Article 43(4))*


- [x] **F6.** Change to identified risks or mitigation measures
  *(Article 9, Article 43(4))* — **changes detected in this area**


- [ ] **F7.** Change to post-market monitoring plan or KPIs
  *(Article 72, Article 43(4))*





---

> **This report is informational. A determination of substantiality under Article 43(4) is a legal judgment requiring human review.**
